label: The Prismworn Cask
description: The Prismworn Cask occupies a narrow basalt-glass vault cut into Seamline Concord’s escarpment face, its walls burnished to a dull sheen by electrostatically pinned glass dust. A low bar of fused mirror-slag runs the length of the main room, catching the city’s copper-white twilight and throwing it back in broken, navigationally precise angles. Ceiling baffles of darkened crystal dampen street hum into a measured hush, while inlaid seam-line tracery in the floor aligns the interior to the auroral girdle’s calibrated sightlines. Cistern-fed condensers keep the air cool and mineral-clean, leaving a faint metallic brightness on every surface.
